name: testDisplaySingleRowWhenAcquirerIsSelected
description: Verifies that the Acquirers table displays correct data for the selected acquirer and shows relevant action buttons.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that the Acquirers table displays correct data for the selected acquirer and shows relevant action buttons.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as 'SUPER'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Uncheck 'Remember me' checkbox
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Verifies that the Acquirers table displays correct data for the selected acquirer and shows relevant action buttons.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Acquirers' tab
Enter 'Acquirer 11.002.01' into select acquirer placeholder
Click 'Acquirer 11.002.01' in dropdown
Verify: List of acquirers has only 1 row in the table
Verify that displayed 'Acquirer name' is: Acquirer 11.002.01
Verify that displayed 'Acquirer code' is: NGenius
Verify that displayed 'Currencies' is: USD, EUR
Verify that displayed 'Acquirer config' is: default

Verify that displayed 'System config' is: https://test.npgw.xyz/challenge/url
https://test.npgw.xyz/fingerprint/url
https://test.npgw.xyz/resource/url
notificationQueue
Verify that displayed 'Status' is: Active
Verify: Edit button is visible
Verify: Activate/Deactivate acquirer button is visible
Verify: Pagination shows only one page labeled '1'
